hero.title: Transparent pricing, no surprises
hero.subtitle: Start free, upgrade anytime
hero.description: Choose the plan that fits your needs. No hidden fees, no commitments — cancel anytime.

free.name: Basic Free
free.description: Everything you need to start your journey to savings.

items.question: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
items.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time with no commitments. After cancellation, you will have access to Premium features until the end of the paid period.

items.question: What happens to my data after ending Premium?
items.answer: Your data is safe. After switching to the Free plan, you will still have access to the last 12 months of data. Older records remain stored but will not be visible.

items.question: How does the 14-day trial work?
items.answer: After registering for the Premium plan, you have 14 days free. Payment is charged only after the trial period ends. You can cancel at any time during this period at no charge.

items.question: Are my payment details safe?
items.answer: Payments are processed through Stripe — one of the world's most trusted payment providers. We never store your payment details on our servers.

items.question: Can I add multiple properties in the Free plan?
items.answer: The Free plan allows you to track 1 supply point. For more properties or supply points, you need to upgrade to Premium.

items.question: Do you offer discounts for households with multiple properties?
items.answer: We currently offer the Premium plan at a flat price that covers unlimited supply points — so the more properties you have, the more value you get.

cta.title: Ready to start saving?
cta.description: Join thousands of households that have their energy under control.
